# ASImportableCredential.GeneratedPassword

**Structure**

A representation of GeneratedPassword as defined in the [https://fidoalliance.org/specs/cx/cxf-v1.0-rd-20250313.html] This represents a machine-generated password.

## Declaration

```swift
struct GeneratedPassword
```

## Initializers

- **init(password:)**

## Instance Properties

- **password**

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
